items.title: Tuesday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
items.description: November started with gains for both the Nasdaq and the S&P 500, but it was a down day for the Dow Jones Industrial Average, as AI stocks were leading the charge once again.

items.description: Following President Trump's return from Asia, eyes are on whether an end to the government shutdown is in sight. Meanwhile, investors will dig into earnings from McDonald’s, Palantir and a host of other companies.
